     l e t your p r e s e n t opinion or inform ation i n f l u e n c e your

     d i s c u s s i o n i n a c a s e o r l e t i t p r e v e n t you from r e n d e r i n g

     any p r o p e r v e r d i c t r e q u i r e d by t h e f a c t s and t h e l a w .           The

     t e s t for qualificatio n for jury service i s not the private

     feelings of a juror.                Rather i t i s whether t h e j u r o r can

     h o n e s t l y s e t a s i d e any such f e e l i n g s and f a i r l y c on s i d e r t h e

     la w and e vi denc e and i m p a r t i a l l y dete rm in e t h e i s s u e s .

                     All right.          W e ' l l now p r o c e e d w i t h s e l e c t i n g t h e

     jury.      Once y o u ' r e c a l l e d t o t h e j u r y b o x , t h e s e a t y o u ' r e

     g i v e n w i l l b e y o u r s e a t u n t i l you a r e e x c u s e d .      I f you're

     n o t c a l l e d , p l e a s e pay a t t e n t i o n t o t h e q u e s t i o n s be i n g

     asked of t he ot he r p o t e n t i a l j u r o r s .         Remember, an y

     q u e s t i o n s a ske d a r e n o t meant t o em b a r r a s s y o u , b u t t o h e l p

     gain informatio n about your a b i l i t y t o s e rv e a s a j u r o r i n

     this case.         All right.          Madam c l e r k , i f y o u w o u l d p l e a s e

     call the f i r s t        prospective jur or s .

                      [ j u r y s e l e c t i o n commence d a t : p . m . ]

          [ p r o s p e c t i v e j u r o r s excused f o r t h e day a t : p . m . ]

                     THE COURT:          I ' l l t e l l you f o r y o u r b e n e f i t , w e ' l l

     pick two a l t e r n a t e s , so bear t h a t i n mind.                Al s o i t would

     b e my i n t e n t i o n t o a l l o w t h e j u r o r s t o u s e n o t e s .      O n c e we
